Interface ReadableMonster

All Superinterfaces:
HasClient, HasSfsData, Positioned
All Known Subinterfaces:
ReadableEggBoxMonster
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractMonster, EggBoxMonster, Monster, UnownedEggBoxMonster, UnownedMonster
public interface ReadableMonster extends HasClient, HasSfsData, Positioned
